zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tresenriter於1779年11月22日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州道分時，他的父親Georg Konrad Tresenriter29歲，母親Susannah Margaretha Jacobin26歲。他於1803年與Rhoda A Hancock在美國肯塔基州謝佛遜結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1861年1月在美國印第安納州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Tresenriter于1779年11月22日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州道分时，他的父亲Georg Konrad Tresenriter29岁，母亲Susannah Margaretha Jacobin26岁。他于1803年与Rhoda A Hancock在美国肯塔基州謝佛遜结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1861年1月在美国印第安纳州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.
Historical Boundaries 1785: Dauphin, Pennsylvania, United States
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.
Historical Information 1833:  Floyd, Indiana, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: Constitution of 1851
historicEvents.description: Due to the state’s financial crisis during the previous decade and growing criticism toward state government. Voters approve the Constitution of 1851 which forbade the state government from going into debt.

en.lifeSummary: When John Tresenriter was born on 22 November 1779, in Dauphin, Pennsylvania, United States, his father, Georg Konrad Tresenriter, was 29 and his mother, Susannah Margaretha Jacobin, was 26. He married Rhoda A Hancock in 1803, in Jefferson, Kentucky, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died in January 1861, in Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, United States, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tresenriter est né le 22 novembre 1779, à Dauphin, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, Georg Konrad Tresenriter, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Susannah Margaretha Jacobin, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Rhoda A Hancock en 1803, à Jefferson, Kentucky, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1861, à Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, États-Unis, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Tresenriter am 22. November 1779 in Dauphin, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Georg Konrad Tresenriter 29 und seine Mutter Susannah Margaretha Jacobin 26. Er hat 1803 in Jefferson, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten Rhoda A Hancock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1861 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Tresenriter è nato il il 22 novembre 1779 nel Dauphin, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Georg Konrad Tresenriter, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Susannah Margaretha Jacobin, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Rhoda A Hancock nel 1803, nel Jefferson, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1861, nel Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tresenriterが1779年11月22日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ダウフィンで生まれた時，父Georg Konrad Tresenriterは29歳，母Susannah Margaretha Jacobinは26歳であった。1803年にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州ジェフエルソンでRhoda A Hancockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1861年1月にアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州フロイドジョージェトウン トウンシュイップで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Tresenriter(이)가 1779년 11월 22일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 도필에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Georg Konrad Tresenriter(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Susannah Margaretha Jacobin(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1803년 미국 켄터키 주 제퍼슨에서 Rhoda A Hancock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1861년 1월 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 조짓운 타운시프에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tresenriter nasceu em 22 de novembro de 1779, em Dauphin, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Georg Konrad Tresenriter, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Susannah Margaretha Jacobin, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Rhoda A Hancock em 1803, em Jefferson, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1861, em Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tresenriter родился 22 ноября 1779 г. в местности дауфин, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Georg Konrad Tresenriter было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah Margaretha Jacobin, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Rhoda A Hancock в 1803 г. в местности джеффирсон, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер январь 1861 г. в местности джеоргетоун тоуншип, флоид, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Tresenriter nació el 22 de noviembre de 1779, en Dauphin, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, Georg Konrad Tresenriter, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Susannah Margaretha Jacobin, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Rhoda A Hancock en 1803, en Jefferson, Kentucky, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1861, en Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 81 años.
